footer.description: Unifies document collection, AI-powered preliminary review, and attorney-controlled decision workflows for immigration law firms.

hero.body: VisaVault AI unifies document collection, AI-powered preliminary review, and attorney-controlled decision workflows in a single digital workspace. Streamlined processes, full case visibility.
hero.bodySmall: AI provides preliminary review support. Final legal assessment remains with the attorney.

problem.heading: Document Workflow Challenges in Immigration Law
problem.description: Document collection and preliminary review remain among the most time-consuming stages for immigration law firms.

items.title: Scattered Document Collection
items.description: Documents arrive via email, WhatsApp, file sharing, and other channels. It's unclear which documents have been received and which are still missing.

items.title: Endless Revision Cycles
items.description: Clients are asked for the same documents repeatedly, version conflicts arise, and no one has a clear view of the latest status.

items.title: Slow Preliminary Review
items.description: Reviewing each document manually takes time. Attorney hours are spent on low-value verification tasks instead of substantive legal work.

items.title: Fragmented Communication
items.description: Communication between clients and attorneys is scattered across multiple channels. Notes get lost, and context is incomplete.

solution.heading: One Platform, Streamlined Process
solution.description: VisaVault AI consolidates the entire workflow — from document collection to attorney approval — in a single digital workspace.

items.title: Client Document Upload
items.description: Clients upload their documents through a secure portal. Which documents are expected and which have been received is always clear.

items.title: AI Preliminary Review
items.description: Uploaded documents undergo AI-powered preliminary review. Missing items, inconsistencies, and areas requiring attention are automatically flagged.

items.title: Attorney Assessment
items.description: The attorney reviews the AI preliminary findings, adds their own notes, and makes the decision on the document. The final word always rests with the attorney.

items.title: Revision & Communication
items.description: Revision requests are sent to clients for incomplete or insufficient documents. The entire process stays within a single workflow.

items.title: Controlled Communication Flow
items.description: Client-attorney communication is organized on a per-case basis. Notes, requests, and updates are consolidated in one place.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Four steps to a more controlled and transparent document collection and review process.

steps.title: Document Upload
steps.description: The client uploads required documents through a secure portal. Missing documents are automatically listed.

steps.title: AI Pre-Review
steps.description: Uploaded documents undergo AI-powered preliminary review. Potential gaps and areas requiring attention are flagged.

steps.title: Attorney Review
steps.description: The attorney reviews the AI's preliminary notes, performs an independent assessment, and makes the decision.

steps.title: Revision or Approval
steps.description: If sufficient, the document is approved. If not, a clear revision request is sent to the client. The process continues within the same workflow.

productProof.heading: See the Product Up Close
productProof.description: The actual VisaVault AI interface. Client portal, document review screen, and attorney decision panel.
productProof.captionDashboard: Attorney panel — Case status, document list, and AI pre-review notes
productProof.altDashboard: VisaVault AI — Case management panel and document status
productProof.altReview: VisaVault AI — Document detail and AI review panel
productProof.altMobile: VisaVault AI — Client mobile document upload

attorneyControl.headingAccent: Final Decision Rests with the Attorney

items.title: AI Reviews Documents First
items.description: The AI checks uploaded documents and flags potential gaps and inconsistencies. This serves as a preliminary filtering layer.

items.title: Attorney Makes the Final Call
items.description: The attorney uses the AI pre-review as a reference but performs an independent assessment and makes the final decision on each document.

items.title: No Automated Decisions
items.description: The system never automatically approves or rejects any document. Every document must go through attorney review.

attorneyControl.flowAiText: Passport document uploaded. Validity date is consistent. Signature field requires verification.
attorneyControl.flowAttorneyText: Signature field reviewed — document accepted. Client notification sent.

auditability.heading: Transparent & Auditable Process
auditability.description: Every document, every step, and every decision is on record. The process becomes transparent, traceable, and manageable.

items.title: Document Status Tracking
items.description: The current status of every document (pending, in review, approved, revision required) is visible at a glance.

items.title: Process Timeline
items.description: A dated timeline is maintained for each case. Who did what, and when — clearly documented.

items.title: Decision Notes
items.description: Attorney notes and AI pre-review summaries are stored per document. Revision history is preserved.

items.title: Audit Trail
items.description: All actions are logged. Who took which step and when is always traceable throughout the process.

pilotCTA.heading: Start with a Controlled Pilot
pilotCTA.description: Evaluate VisaVault AI over a 2–4 week pilot program with limited scope and measurable goals. Test with real cases, zero risk.

items.question: Does VisaVault AI make decisions on behalf of the attorney?
items.answer: No. VisaVault AI only provides preliminary review support. It flags potential gaps and areas of concern in documents. Approval, rejection, or revision decisions always rest with the attorney. The system never automatically approves or rejects any document.

items.question: What types of law firms is it suitable for?
items.answer: VisaVault AI is designed primarily for boutique and mid-size law firms practicing immigration law. It's well-suited for firms experiencing high volume in document collection and preliminary review, and those looking to streamline client communication.

items.question: How does the pilot program work?
items.answer: The pilot program runs for 2–4 weeks. It allows you to test the platform on a limited number of cases with measurable goals in your real workflow. Technical support is provided throughout the pilot.

items.question: Are our documents secure?
items.answer: Documents are stored on secure infrastructure. Role-based access control is enforced. No document is shared or exported without attorney approval. See our security page for more details.

items.question: Do I need to completely change my existing workflow?
items.answer: No. VisaVault AI works as a digitized version of your existing document collection process. It is designed to integrate with your current workflow, not replace it. No radical changes required.

items.question: What if my clients aren't tech-savvy?
items.answer: The client portal is kept as simple as possible. Core functions — document upload, status tracking, and messaging — are presented through a clean, intuitive interface. No complex learning curve.

pilot.heading: Evaluate with a
pilot.body: Test VisaVault AI with your firm's real cases, limited scope, and a 2–4 week pilot program. Make a data-driven decision with zero risk.
pilot.whatBody: The pilot program is a short-term evaluation that lets you test VisaVault AI in your real workflow, in a controlled environment. The goal is to determine — with concrete data — whether the platform is the right fit for your firm.
whoItems: Immigration law firms with regular case volume
Teams experiencing recurring issues in document collection
Attorneys looking to improve processes with digital tools
Decision-makers seeking a controlled way to test new tools

scopeItems.title: Limited Case Scope
scopeItems.description: During the pilot, work is done on a defined number of cases. No need to change your entire firm's operations.

scopeItems.title: Measurable Goals
scopeItems.description: Metrics such as document collection time, revision cycles, and attorney review speed are defined upfront.

scopeItems.title: Technical Support
scopeItems.description: Setup, training, and technical support are provided throughout the pilot. Your questions are answered promptly.

scopeItems.title: Evaluation Report
scopeItems.description: Results and observations from the pilot are shared in a comprehensive report at the end.

pilot.criteriaBody: Measurable improvement is targeted in the following areas during the pilot:
criteriaItems: Client-attorney communication consolidated in one channel
Reduced attorney review time with AI pre-review
pilot.collabBody: Your firm's involvement during the pilot is minimal. Just designating the cases for the platform and assigning one team member as the primary contact is sufficient. We handle the rest — setup, onboarding, and training.
pilot.formBody: Fill out the form and let's plan the pilot program details together.

security.heading: Security & Control
security.body: VisaVault AI prioritizes security, control, and auditability throughout the document management process for law firms. Below are the platform's core security and control principles.

items.title: Role-Based Access Control
items.description: Each user role (attorney, client, team member) has distinct access levels. Clients can only access their own cases. Attorneys manage only the cases assigned to them. Access boundaries are clearly defined.

items.title: Attorney-Controlled Workflow
items.description: No document is automatically approved or rejected. The AI system only performs preliminary review and flags areas of concern. Approval, rejection, and revision decisions are made solely by the attorney.

items.title: Controlled Document Review Flow
items.description: Documents follow a structured workflow: upload → AI pre-review → attorney assessment → decision. Every step is recorded. Document statuses (pending, in review, approved, revision required) are always visible.

items.title: Auditability & Process Visibility
items.description: All actions (document upload, review, note addition, decision-making, revision requests) are recorded with timestamps. A per-case timeline shows who did what and when. The audit trail is always accessible.

items.title: Secure Document Management
items.description: Documents are stored on secure infrastructure. File transfers use encrypted connections. Access permissions are restricted by role. Documents cannot be exported without attorney approval.

items.title: Email & Notification Separation
items.description: Notifications sent through the platform contain workflow status updates only. Email content does not include document details — it only provides a link to the relevant action. Sensitive information is never shared via email.

security.disclaimer: This page provides a general overview of VisaVault AI's security approach. The features described reflect the current architectural design and development goals. Third-party security certifications have not yet been obtained. For detailed security inquiries, please contact us.

sections.title: 1. Overview
sections.content: VisaVault AI ("Platform", "we") values the privacy of its users. This privacy policy explains how personal data collected through our website (visavaultai.com) and platform is processed.

sections.title: 2. Data Collected
sections.content: The following information may be collected through contact forms and platform usage:
list: Messages and notes submitted through forms
Website usage data (cookies, page visits, and other technical information)

sections.title: 3. Purpose of Data Use
sections.content: Collected data is used for the following purposes:
list: Processing demo and pilot program requests

sections.title: 4. Data Sharing
sections.content: Your personal data is not shared with third parties for marketing purposes without your explicit consent. Data may be processed by our service providers (email delivery service, hosting provider, etc.) solely for the purpose of service delivery. These providers are contractually bound not to use the data for their own purposes.

sections.title: 5. Data Security
sections.content: Appropriate technical and organizational measures are in place to protect your personal data. Data is stored on secure servers and access is restricted. However, no internet transmission can be guaranteed to be absolutely secure.

sections.title: 6. Cookies
sections.content: Our website may use technical cookies to ensure basic functionality. If analytics or marketing cookies are used, separate notice will be provided and necessary consents will be obtained.

sections.title: 7. Your Rights
sections.content: Under applicable data protection regulations, you have the following rights:
list: Request correction or deletion of your data
sections.contactNote: To exercise these rights, please contact us at privacy@visavaultai.com.

sections.title: 8. Changes
sections.content: This privacy policy may be updated from time to time. Changes will be published on this page. Additional notice may be provided for significant changes.

sections.title: 9. Contact
sections.content: For questions about our privacy policy, please contact us at privacy@visavaultai.com.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance
sections.content: By using this website (visavaultai.com) or the VisaVault AI platform, you agree to the following terms of service. If you do not accept these terms, you should not use the website or the platform.

sections.title: 2. Service Description
sections.content: VisaVault AI is a digital platform that provides document collection, AI-powered preliminary review, and attorney-controlled decision workflows for immigration law firms. The platform does not provide legal advice and does not alter the attorney-client relationship.

sections.title: 3. About AI Pre-Review
sections.content: The AI component in the platform only provides preliminary review support. Notes, suggestions, and flags generated by the AI are for informational purposes and do not constitute legal advice. Final decisions on documents must always be made by a licensed attorney. VisaVault AI does not guarantee the accuracy or completeness of AI outputs.

sections.title: 4. User Responsibilities
list: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.
You must use the platform only for lawful purposes.
You are responsible for the accuracy of documents you upload.
Activities aimed at misusing the platform, reverse engineering, or probing for security vulnerabilities are prohibited.
It is the attorney's responsibility to independently verify AI outputs.

sections.title: 5. Intellectual Property
sections.content: The platform, website, and their contents (software, design, text, graphics) are owned by VisaVault AI and protected by copyright. Unauthorized copying, distribution, or commercial use of the contents is prohibited.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: VisaVault AI does not guarantee that the platform will operate without interruption or error. Our liability for direct or indirect damages arising from the use of the platform is limited to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law. Responsibility for legal decisions always rests with the relevant attorney or law firm.

sections.title: 7. Service Changes
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify the platform's features, pricing, or terms of service with prior notice. Users will be informed of significant changes.

sections.title: 8. Account Termination
sections.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account in the event of a violation of these terms of service. You will be notified in such cases.

sections.title: 9. Governing Law
sections.content: These terms of service are subject to and interpreted under applicable law. Competent courts shall have jurisdiction over disputes.

sections.title: 10. Contact
sections.content: For questions about our terms of service, please contact us at legal@visavaultai.com.
